docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED APR-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, CHRISTIAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BANIA ZUNGIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN LEON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZUNIGA, BANIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON, CHRISTIAN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,070.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ZUNIGA, BANIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, CHRISTIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
